productName: Green Revolution Tincture Extra Relief 30:2:1 (300mg CBD; 20mg THC; 10mg CBC) (28.4ml)
description: A discreet infused drop formula with a modern herbal-apothecary feel, easy to measure and simple to work into any routine. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBD to keep things calm and balanced, and CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect in a 30:2:1 ratio. Made to help you relax and find your calm. Discreet, precise, and easy to dose.
